review_title: Editor in Chief
description: Echobox has changed our entire way of working with social media, which has made the editorial office more efficient.
author: Henrik E.
pros: Echobox is easy to use and saves the editors tons of time that they can use to write articles instead. Their algorithm often finds what can go viral. The contact with our success manager has always been perfect. They respond quickly and are always professional.
cons: It would be fantastic to have a local contact who can see trends for the Nordic countries

review_title: An amazing social media scheduling tool that saves your team hours of work every day
description: Echobox is the mot user-friendly social media scheduling tool out there and the Customer Support team are very approachable and proactive too.
author: Thomas C.
pros: Echobox allows us to automate social media postings, saving invaluable time for our social media team.
cons: Echobox does not provide as in-depth analytics as some of its competitors.

review_title: Do what you pay for...
description: Really unpleasing, the sales team never answered on why their promises were in fact lies, we lose precious time trying to fix it where actully the truth: that simply does not work...
author: Lena L.
pros: Avoid you to have to think about time slots and that's it...
cons: impossible to post videos... And the increase of reach NEVER happened, all the opposite, our reach was WORSE. The IA was useless (no posts in the afternoon for no reason).

review_title: Optimizing Social Media Engagement: Our Experience with Echobox
description: At eCycle, we adopted Echobox to optimize the distribution of our content on social media, increase engagement with our posts, and expand the audience of our website. The tool has proven to be essential for the publication flow of our content, employing an intelligent approach to determining the best times, types of content, and captions. In addition to simplifying the process, it has delivered excellent results. In a short time, we have observed improvements in both reach and engagement on social media, as well as increased traffic generated, especially from our newsletters, which are now also automated. This automation enables our team to concentrate on strategic tasks that are essential for the business. The dashboard is intuitive, and the implementation was quick. The support team is extremely attentive and always available. Without a doubt, Echobox is worth every investment!
author: Cláudia C.
pros: Content Distribution, Optimizing Posting Schedule, Audience Engagement, Automated Publishing, Performance Analytics, Centralized Management, Automation of Newsletters, Content Performance Measurement, User-Friendly Interface.
cons: Instagram schedule not available, lack of analytics, customized reports

review_title: A huge time-saver and growth-driver
description: Using Echobox helps us coordinate much more easily between the different team's posts and saves several hours of work every week. Since we started using Echobox, hour performance on Facebook increased rapidly.
author: Daniel N.
pros: Echobox is extremely easy to use, even for team members that are not familiar with social media posting. It is very helpful to be able to easily access analytics to see how posts performed in order to decide what to re-share or optimize. The ability to set up A/B tests within the tool has greatly supported our growth.
cons: We are very happy with the provided features and user experience. I cannot think of any major negative aspects.

review_title: Social Media promotion and monitoring with results and an efficient, intutive interface
description: Especially pleased that when we encountered operational or management problems, Echobox customer service was very responsive.
author: Jon E.
pros: Its easy to use interface and its AI capabilities, which has helped us in scheduling and identifying best performing social media.
cons: No serious issues at this time. Efficient and easy to use.

review_title: Smart Social Media Publsihing Tool for Publisher
author: Raweewan K.
pros: A substantial boost in reach, engagement, and followers since we began using the platform. And the statistics have been increasing for more than a year now, based on Echobox CTR analytics, because it helps us learn what our audience prefers and enjoys reading.
cons: The analytics dashboard can be improved to provide more details on social media performance such as reach and engagement numbers.

review_title: A great efficient way to manage our accounts
description: Echobox has been a real asset to the Audience team at The Independent. When we first started using it in December 2017, it still had the odd hiccup, but it has improved so imeasurably since then, I rarely have problems - and if I ever do, Echobox are very responsive and helpful.
author: Ben K.
pros: I like that Echobox is easy to use, and feels like it complements our media output. It is accessible, so it's easy for me to teach others on the team, and in the company more generally, how to use it. I like that we can run so many social media accounts through it. It has saved us valuable time we used to spend on posting, and really helps us deliver more traffic to the site.
cons: I suppose that the number ranking on stories could be a bit better tuned in some areas, but largely I know when something is numbered a bit wrong. Also, it would be nice to expand some features, such as the time frames you can view (maybe adding in some more specific, 1 hour, 30 mins, etc...).

review_title: Extremely helpful
author: Frosso M.
pros: The most helpful assistant , saves a lot of time by sharing the posts automatically, the algorithm is extremely helpful with what will be most likely be liked by our readers and the fact that we can schedule posts whenever we want is advantageous.
cons: It would be perfect if there was an application for iOS. §

review_title: Useful tool, but still far from perfect
author: Alessandro S.
pros: Echobox is both a platform to manage social media posts and an AI. It's really useful because it picks up contents from your feed history and let you manage them, assigning to three main categories (evergreen, breaking and normal) and time options. Then you can let it organize shares&future reshares.
cons: Instagram scheduling not so good. Sponsored parternships on Facebook not possible. Once you create and archive of contents, you can't edit it. It's somewhere in Echobox's intelligence.

review_title: Una gran herramienta
description: La experiencia es muy buena. La herramienta nos dio buenos resultados, permitiéndonos hacer más eficientes nuestras publicaciones en redes sociales.
author: Damian C.
pros: Es una herramienta que permite programar y automatizar con eficiencia las publicaciones en redes sociales.
cons: Que la configuración depende del proveedor del producto y no de mi organización.

review_title: Echobox reseña
description: El uso es diario para publicación, programación y edición de contenido a publicar en Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn y X. La automatización es clave, ya que el volumen de publicaciones es grande y esta permite sacar el contenido en el orden y momento más acorde según el comportamiento de nuestros seguidores.
author: Huenu C.
pros: La herramienta ayuda a agilizar el trabajo del equipo de Redes Sociales al agruparlas todas en un mismo lugar. Sumaron herramientas como compartir reels en colaboración para Instagram, lo que permite programar todo el calendario desde Echobox sin usar las diferentes herramientas nativas. Es de simple uso y más cuando se realizan tareas de manera diaria. La automatización del contenido por franjas horarias, según la necesidad del equipo, es muy útil.
cons: Incorporaron una función que permite transformar en imágenes los diferentes links que se publican, sobre todo en Facebook, con el objetivo de aumentar la distribución, pero aún no se puede establecer correctamente cómo conformar esa publicación (sugerencia enviada), y las imágenes pueden quedar sueltas, por lo que sería bueno que sumen una marca de agua del cliente y que quede identificada.

review_title: Ideal para la automatización de contenidos
description: Mi experiencia ha sido positiva, ya que nos ha permitido integrar de manera fácil y rápida una herramienta para la publicación de contenido en redes sociales, maximizando la productividad y alcance con nuestros usuarios.
author: Leonardo S.
pros: Su facilidad de integración con nuestro sistema a través de RSS y la optimización en la publicación de contenido en redes sociales.
cons: En casos especiales no se permite modificar la forma en que realiza las publicaciones, lo cual seria bueno para ciertos tipos de contenidos.

review_title: Un servicio que sirve de poco
description: Mala. Cuando ellos consideran se puede ajustar el contrato, cuando tu les pides un ajuste se hacen los locos. Muy mal la atención al usuario.
author: Edu P.
pros: Que al principio funcionaba, duró un tiempo y despues nada.
cons: Que no cumplen con lo que te venden. Despues de 3 años de uso, ha quedado claro. En la videollamada te cuentan una cosa y con el tiempo te van encandilando y subiendo el precio por servicios, como IG que ellos mismos retiraron por que no funcionaba.

review_title: Un très bon outil pour les médias qui cherchent à simplifier la gestion de leurs réseaux sociaux.
description: Echobox nous permet de planifier facilement nos publications grâce à l’IA, ce qui nous permet de nous concentrer sur la création de contenu de qualité pour notre site web. Le fait que nous puissions intégrer notre flux RSS nous permet de ne pas manquer une seule de nos publications d’articles.
author: Caroline H.
pros: Echobox est un outil incroyable pour les médias qui cherchent à simplifier la gestion de leurs réseaux sociaux. Nous utilisons Echobox pour diffuser en continu nos articles d'informations locales sur Facebook et Twitter, même en dehors des heures de travail. Grâce à cet outil, nous sommes en mesure de rester connectés avec notre audience à tout moment de la journée, et cela a considérablement augmenté notre portée sur les réseaux sociaux.
cons: En analysant les mots clés, les thèmes et les sujets abordés dans un article, Echobox pourrait générer des hashtags qui reflètent mieux le contenu de nos articles afin d'attirer un public plus engagé. Cette amélioration nous permettrait d'augmenter notre visibilité sur les réseaux sociaux et d'attirer un public plus intéressé par notre contenu. Nous le faisons pour l'instant manuellement.

review_title: Una herramienta para automatizar contenidos
description: En general es una experiencia positiva para quien quiera automatizar procesos
author: Juan Manuel F.
pros: - Programar contenidos en varias cuentas - Inteligencia artificial predictiva - Integración de procesos
cons: - La desconexión con la API de X nos hace ir a a app de forma nativa

review_title: Echobox
description: Mi experiencia global es satisfactoria, ya que nos ha permitido incrementar el tráfico desde las redes sociales como Facebook
author: Carlos G.
pros: La posibilidad de automatizar tareas como compartir en Redes sociales los contenidos que publicamos en nuestro medio online. Así como la generación automática y envío de newsletter.
cons: No hay ningún contra en el uso de este sofware

review_title: Social media automation and content management
description: It saves a lot of time since we can just schedule the next few hours in thirty minutes top, freeing our time to make a strategy or create content for other platforms.
author: Devina Y.
pros: Echobox helps with scheduling and content distribution, as well as reshares and social media analytics. The analytics provided by Echobox are detailed and help a lot for an admin who juggles between many platforms at once, since you can just look at both Twitter and Facebook analytics in one place.
cons: Echobox provides AI-message for social media teasers and captions. It also has automatic posting which depends on the content/keyword of the articles. However, these two features need a lot of human supervision. I've found that Echobox sometimes prioritizes articles that are not time-sensitive or newsworthy.

review_title: Autofeeding news to Facebook is great
description: Easy to use and efficient to publish to Facebook and Twitter
author: Renel B.
pros: It can replace a social media agent by automating the process to send news of the web site to Facebook and Twitter.
cons: Not so easy to exclude stories in the automated process

review_title: A real tool to automate your work on social networks
description: Very good, with personalized attention in the service that has left me with a very good experience and a tool that really impacts my ROI
author: Guillermo C.
pros: It allows me to automate my posting on social networks and makes it easier for me to generate traffic to my website.
cons: So far there is nothing to dislike about Echobox

review_title: Echobox is easy and helpful
description: Very quick to reshare
author: Elena B.
pros: Echobox is very easy to use. It helps you to coordinate your launches on different platforms, to see how your contents are performing and to create a calendar with different people
cons: It would be cool to be able to schedule a post for more than one day. Or also to have a feature that shorten your link automatically

review_title: Great Tool!
description: It has helped us improve our production
author: Edgar Omar R.
pros: It is a great tool that helps you to make your time more efficient.
cons: Missing some options to improve Instagram stories

review_title: Good algorithm
description: Echobox has been an interesting investment that has reduced the workload of our social media team.
author: Paradinas P.
pros: Echobox is a very useful tool that allows you to save costs in social networks thanks to its algorithm. Its artificial intelligence manages the best moments to spread your content.
cons: The system can be complicated during the first days of implementation and requires prior team training. It also takes almost a month for the algorithm to learn from your post.

review_title: Never used a better software for digital mass distribution
description: A must-have software for digital newsrooms.
author: JayJay L.
pros: Internal algorithm ranking RSS feed integration Auto-queueing and scheduling UTM tracking Evergreen/breaking/normal categorisation
cons: The queue sometimes switches its numbers from posting next in above 30 mins to in the next 5 mins.

review_title: Echobox Review
author: Iryna B.
pros: The best part about this software is the concept of AB testing. This feature is very useful and helps you to see how your contents are performing. Easy to use.
cons: 1) A little bit inconvenient post tracking for videos 2) There is no way to add universal video ID and custom labels at the same time 3) The planning system is not clear enough and it is hard to measure the results
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
